meta.ogTitle: Be found by your future customers | Eddie Miller Agency
meta.ogDescription: Is your business recommended when a customer asks ChatGPT? We check for free in 24h: score out of 100 and 3 concrete actions.

hero.title: Your future customers are asking ChatGPT where to go.
hero.titleLine2: We make sure the answer is
hero.subtitle: Today, 45% of consumers ask AI for a recommendation before choosing a restaurant, dentist, or hotel. AI only gives 3 names. If yours isn't one of them, a competitor gets the customer.

socialProof.label: Your customers search here. Are you showing up?

whatYouGet.title: What you get for free
whatYouGet.subtitle: A complete diagnostic of your online visibility, ready in 24 hours.
whatYouGet.item1Text: We run 100 real queries on ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude and Gemini in your industry. Your score = how many times you're recommended. Simple, concrete, measurable.
whatYouGet.item2Text: We identify exactly what prevents AI from recommending you when a customer searches in your city.
whatYouGet.item3Title: The concrete actions to take first
whatYouGet.item3Text: We identify the fixes that will have the most impact on increasing your customer numbers.
whatYouGet.item4Text: We explain your results in person, answer your questions and see together how we can support you.

testimonial.title: What it changes in practice
testimonial.subtitle: The visibility score = how many times you appear when ChatGPT and other AIs are queried across 100 searches.
testimonial.quote1: We couldn't understand why we were getting fewer new patients even though our Google reviews are excellent. The diagnostic showed that ChatGPT simply didn't know us. Within two months, we started receiving calls from patients who said they found our practice "thanks to AI".
testimonial.quote2: An American tourist told me he had asked ChatGPT "best restaurant near Eiffel Tower" and we were in the top 3 results. Before working with Eddie Miller, we didn't show up anywhere. Now we get reservations coming directly from AI.

quote.text: "Best restaurant near me?" — this question is asked on ChatGPT thousands of times a day. The AI gives 3 names. Is yours one of them? Not yet.

solution.title: We make you visible where your future customers search
solution.subtitle: ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Google, Google Maps: we cover all channels.
solution.aiBullet1: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini and Perplexity cite you when a customer asks for a recommendation
solution.aiBullet2: We improve your online reputation to give AI the trust signals to recommend you
solution.aiBullet3: We make you present on the sources that AI consults to formulate their answers
solution.googleBullet1: Your business ranks in Google Maps when a customer searches in your city or neighborhood
solution.googleBullet2: Your Google profile is complete, up-to-date and increases your chances of being contacted
solution.googleBullet3: We implement a strategy to optimize your online reviews

whyUs.title: Why now is the right time
whyUs.subtitle: Every day without visibility means customers going to a competitor.
whyUs.reason1Title: The first to be visible keep the advantage
whyUs.reason1Text: AI works by habit: once it recommends a business, it keeps doing so. Getting in early means building a lasting lead.
whyUs.reason2Text: Most local businesses have no idea that ChatGPT is already influencing their customers. This is a window of opportunity that won't stay open for long.
whyUs.reason3Title: Every day without visibility means lost customers
whyUs.reason3Text: Right now, potential customers are looking for you. If AI doesn't know you, it sends them somewhere else. It's as simple as that.

verticals.title: Solutions tailored to your industry
verticals.subtitle: Every business has its specifics. We adapt our approach to your profession.
verticals.card1Text: "Where should I eat tonight?" The question is asked on ChatGPT. The answer is either you or a competitor.
verticals.card2Text: Travelers plan their trips with AI. We put your hotel in their suggestions.
verticals.card3Text: "Where to go out tonight?" AI is the new nightlife guide. Be in its recommendations.
verticals.card4Text: Your future patients search for a doctor on ChatGPT. We make sure your practice gets recommended.
verticals.card5Text: Your future patients ask ChatGPT for a dentist. We make sure it recommends you.
verticals.card6Text: A client urgently looking for a lawyer asks AI. Be the name that comes up.
verticals.card7Text: "Best hairdresser near me?" AI gives 3 names. Make sure yours is one of them.
verticals.card8Text: Your future clients are looking for a spa in their city. AI answers them — we make sure it's you.
verticals.card9Text: New members ask AI for advice before signing up. We make you impossible to miss.
verticals.card10Text: Your industry isn't listed? We adapt our approach to your sector. Contact us for a tailored diagnostic.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: 3 simple steps to be found by your future customers.
howItWorks.step1Text: Fill in the form in 1 minute. We run 100 real queries on ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude and Gemini. You receive your visibility score, the full audit and priority actions within 24h.
howItWorks.step2Text: 15 minutes on the phone to go through your results, answer your questions and see how we can help you get recommended more by AI.
howItWorks.step3Text: If you decide to work with us, we take care of everything. We implement the fixes for you — you don't have to do a thing. Within a few weeks, new customers start finding you through AI recommendations.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq.q1: What exactly do you do for me?
faq.a1: We make sure that when someone searches for a business like yours — whether on ChatGPT or another AI assistant — they find you instead of a competitor. We take care of your Google Business Profile, your presence on the right directories, and all the technical settings that make AI recommend you.
faq.q2: How quickly will I see a difference?
faq.a2: The first results on Google are visible within a few days. For AI recommendations like ChatGPT, allow 4 to 8 weeks. We measure your score before and after: you see the progress in numbers, not promises.
faq.q3: Do you guarantee I'll appear on ChatGPT?
faq.a3: Very nearly. But be wary of anyone who promises it 100%. AI chooses its recommendations autonomously. What we do guarantee is that your business will have all the right conditions to be recommended — and we measure it concretely with a before/after score. You can clearly see the improvement, in hard numbers.
faq.q4: Does it really work for my industry?
faq.a4: Yes. Our method is proven and applies to any business with a physical address: dental practices, medical clinics, law firms, restaurants, hotels, bars, nightclubs, hair salons, spas, gyms. If your customers search based on location, we can help.
faq.q5: I already have great Google reviews. Isn't that enough?
faq.a5: Having great Google reviews is essential, but it's only part of the equation. 83% of businesses with excellent Google reviews don't appear in ChatGPT recommendations. AI doesn't rely on the same criteria as Google to choose who to recommend. That's exactly what we identify in the free diagnostic: what's missing for AI to recommend you too.
faq.a6: It helps, but it's not essential. A large part of your visibility comes from your Google Business Profile, industry-specific directories, and specific technical settings. We optimize your entire online presence, with or without a website.
faq.q7: How much of my time does it take?
faq.a7: Very little. You fill in a 1-minute form for the diagnostic, then we call you for 15 minutes to explain our recommendations. We guide you step by step.
faq.a8: You can. But between understanding how Google and AI algorithms work, identifying what's blocking you, and implementing the fixes, expect 25 to 30 hours of work. We do it in a few days with a proven method and our experience across dozens of businesses.
faq.a9: The diagnostic is 100% free with no commitment. After that, our plans range from €399 to €1,199 depending on your needs. We explain each option during the 15-minute call.
faq.q10: What's the difference from a traditional SEO agency?
faq.a10: A traditional SEO agency helps you rank higher on Google. We go further: we also make you visible in the responses of ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini. It's a new customer channel that most agencies don't cover yet — and it's our specialty.
